findings_for_other_threads: The live acceptance run (live services + Electron build) is operator-driven; the script at extensions/acceptance-harness/scripts/acceptance.mjs handles attach + handle parsing + receipt emission. Thread C's 07.T10 + 08.T9 acceptance tests can consume this script as a sub-process.

The acceptance plan is data (TRACK_05_T9_ACCEPTANCE_PLAN in lib/common/acceptance-plan.js). Other tracks adding services or steps should extend the plan rather than fork it — keep IOD-17 single-source-of-truth invariant.
